title: lyonia ligustrina var. salicifolia
intro: Lyonia ligustrina var. salicifolia, also known as the fern-leaf fothergilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Lyonia ligustrina var. salicifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
